arts.ttl: Manchester United receive Chido-Obi team news hint ahead of Fulham FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Talented forward Chido-Obi may be involved for Man United in their FA Cup clash at home to Fulham on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Fulham XI vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Fulham head to Manchester United to take on the holders in the FA Cup’s fifth round this afternoon. The West Londoners are aiming to reach the quarter-finals for just the second time since 2010/11. arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim addresses transfer situation amid fresh Alejandro Garnacho exit rumours
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that summer departures are inevitable amid fresh speculation surrounding Alejandro Garnacho's future.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United continue their defence of the FA Cup against Fulham this afternoon. Ruben Amorim’s side host Fulham in the fifth round with the victors to progress into the quarter-finals. arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Fulham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Fulham to Old Trafford this afternoon in the fifth round of the FA Cup. In the previous round, the Red Devils knocked out Leicester City courtesy of a stoppage-time header from Harry Maguire. Patrick Dorgu is banned for today’s tie after he was shown a straight red card against Ipswich in midweek. arts.ttl: I didn’t get a chance at Manchester United - now I want to show them they made a mistake
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the FA Cup fifth round sees the Red Devils come up against a former player as they host Fulham at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal HIJACK Man Utd offer for Nigerian superstar
arts.sum: Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025. However, top Turkish journalist Yağız Sabuncuoğlu now reports that Arsenal are hijacking Man Utd's move for Osimhen.

arts.ttl: Fulham star ruined Man Utd transfer chances with FA Cup meltdown
arts.sum: Manchester United beat Fulham in a bad-tempered FA Cup meeting in 2023 which had transfer repercussions, and the two sides will face off once again in this season's competition

arts.ttl: ‘What Sir Alex Ferguson did amazed me - his treatment of Man Utd players was telling’
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker Giuseppe Rossi has opened up on his time at Old Trafford and how Sir Alex Ferguson treated him like a son from the moment he arrived

arts.ttl: Man Utd icon rerouted helicopter 'to go partying' and forced Alex Ferguson to make apology
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Dwight Yorke once decided to make a detour after being provided with a helicopter by Sir Alex Ferguson to aid his return from an international match
